【单女主】【小甜文】【萌娃日常】【不套路】
　　一年前，叶辰在酒店邂逅了一名美女。
　　一年后，叶辰忽然接到一通民警电话，有个孕妇马上要生了，想要见一见他。
　　后来叶辰得知孕妇竟是一年前与他邂逅的美女！
　　最关键是，对方还怀了他的孩子！
　　面对如此窘境，还在大学的叶辰显得手足无措！
　　叮，宿主不要慌！最强奶爸系统为你服务！”
　　“逗宝宝们开心，奖励独栋别墅!!”
　　“保护宝宝们，奖励军体拳!!”
　　“给宝宝们泡奶粉，奖励神级厨艺!!”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a8bc5a4ec68613423bcfbf6c2b1c14b9","author":"三味叔屋","author_id":"","book_id":"7428121163802348568","book_name":"校花产下四胞胎，奶爸系统降临！","book_short_name":"叶辰奶爸","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9326人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7428187588143350296","read_count":"9326","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1010253"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"480","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,奶爸,校花,单女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/659caf816d893c50016d207343685c06~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398609&x-signature=FlSaQ%2F9nfLU7B3y4W4vPznm1eIM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2066678564795159","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"80"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230523299A6719D64D35184BD81A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"li sten_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":125843,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1534},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7442213534819222296","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真是喜事连连，男主已然荣升为父亲，女主也迎来了宝宝的降临。这如诗如画的画面，实在是太过甜蜜了。

在这个绚烂多彩的世界里，时光流转，历史沉淀。它并非简单地匆匆流逝，而是一种无比精妙且丰富多彩的体验。一切美好的事物都在这个世界中蓬勃生长，就如同锦绣般的画布上被无数个笔触巧妙地点缀着。每一笔都是华丽的舞动，每一次流转都承载着深深的历史积淀和绚烂的憧憬。
作者妙笔生花啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732778975,"group_id":"7428121163802348568","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ikZM9cQct5n94gbTH1A3OSkZXqRFAq9bk/A0MSKliW","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3d3193d5c1b446bab903e4bdefefa4f7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795770&x-signature=I%2Ba76stQJuhIEW9gYocHnIxpeyE%3D","user_id":"1260456308913344","user_name":"月帔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1260456308913344","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7428121163802348568","book_info":{"abstract":"（百万完结~~量大管饱嗷~）
